title: Bitwise AND of Numbers Range
hints: Consider how the bitwise AND behaves when the range includes numbers with differing bits. What happens to a bit position if any number in the range has a 0 there?
Focus on the most significant bits. Which bits remain unchanged across the entire range from left to right?
The result is the common prefix of the binary representations of left and right. All bits to the right of this prefix become 0.
